factual_corrections: PRX does NOT require 'exactly 75' references - there is no exact ref count requirement. PRX caps main text at ~12 pages but ref count is flexible. This is a self-imposed constraint that should be noted as such.
arXiv does NOT have a 50-citation minimum or maximum. No citation limits exist.
Optica submission URL is https://prism.opticaopen.org/ (not opticasubmit.org, which redirects)
PRX publication fee is ~$2,700 for APS members (not $3,500 as stated)
HuggingFace Papers does NOT auto-aggregate all arXiv papers - it features selected/upvoted papers
Cover letter lists location as Wyomissing PA 19610 but README says Erie PA / Annville PA
